title: Lavish Lights
description: Retextures various light sources, and adds many emissive textures
body:
# Lavish Lights
Retextures various light sources, and adds many emmisive textures. Changes the sound of glowstone blocks.
## Dependencies
- [**Continuity**](https://modrinth.com/project/1IjD5062) (Optional, needed for some of the emissive textures)
## Compatibility
- [**Punchy**](https://modrinth.com/project/8aoMKplv)
---
